---
title: "Journals"
toc: true
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

The **Web of Science Core Collection™** is the premier resource on the platform and includes over 21,000 peer-reviewed, high-quality scholarly journals.

It comprises four key indices:

1. **Science Citation Index Expanded™ (SCIE)**: Covers more than 9,200 of the world’s most impactful journals.
2. **Social Sciences Citation Index™ (SSCI)**: Covers over 3,400 of the world’s leading journals of social sciences.
3. **Arts & Humanities Citation Index™ (AHCI)**: Covers over 1,800 journals.
4. **Emerging Sources Citation Index™ (ESCI)**: Covers emerging trends.

This list is specifically compiled for research areas including:

* Rural Development, Labour Livelihood
* Environment, Vegetation, Degradation, LULC Change
* Water, Ground Water, Drought, Flood
* Climate, Extreme Events
* Soil, Topography
* Remote Sensing (SAR Radar, etc.)

## Prioritizing No-Fee Publishing

To support researchers with limited funding, this list **prioritizes journals that offer a "Subscription" or "Hybrid" model**. In this model, **authors do NOT pay publication fees** (Article Processing Charges - APCs).

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="https://mjl.clarivate.com/manuscript-matcher" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Find Journals with Manuscript Matcher
  </a>
</div>

<br>

## Journal Finder Tools

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://wos-journal.info/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>WoS & SCI Journal Search</h3>
Easily search for Web of Science (SCI/SCIE/SSCI) indexed journals, verify their quartiles, and check Impact Factors for quality assurance.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://listofjournals.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>List of Journals</h3>
A comprehensive directory to browse and discover academic journals across various disciplines, indexing services, and publishers.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://journalsearches.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Journal Searches</h3>
An advanced tool designed to help researchers identify the most suitable journals for their manuscripts based on scope and metrics.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://phdtalks.org/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>PhD Talks</h3>
A comprehensive portal providing daily updates on academic opportunities, research tools, writing guides, and career advice for PhD candidates.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

:::


:::

<br>

## Publisher Submission Guide: Avoiding Fees

Most top-tier journals are **Hybrid**, meaning they offer both a **Subscription** (Free for authors) and an **Open Access** (Paid) option. To avoid paying Article Processing Charges (APCs), you must select the correct option during submission.

::: {.callout-tip}
### 💡 Key Terminology
*   **Subscription / Traditional**: The reader pays (via university library), so the **author pays nothing**.
*   **Gold Open Access**: The author pays an APC to make the article free for everyone.
*   **Hybrid**: A journal that offers **BOTH** options. You must strictly choose "Subscription" to publish for free.
:::

### How to Select "No-Fee" by Publisher

| Publisher | System Name | Action Required for Free Publishing |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Elsevier** | Editorial Manager | Look for the **"Publishing Options"** step after acceptance. Select **"Subscription"** (often the default is Open Access, be careful). |
| **Springer** | Editorial Manager / SNAPP | During submission, you will be asked about Open Access. Select **"No, I want to publish my article via the traditional subscription model"**. |
| **Wiley** | ScholarOne | In the license signing phase (Author Services), choose the **"OnlineOpen: No"** or **"Standard License"** option. |
| **Taylor & Francis** | ScholarOne | After acceptance, select **"Standard Article"** (Green OA compliant) instead of "Gold Open Access". |
| **IEEE** | ScholarOne | IEEE often has page charges for long papers (e.g., >10 pages). Standard publication is free within page limits; avoid selecting "Open Access". |

<br>

## Prioritized Journal Lists

The following lists are curated for researchers seeking **Web of Science (SCIE/SSCI/AHCI/ESCI)** indexed journals with **No-Fee (Subscription/Hybrid)** publication options.

::: {.callout-note}
**Note:** "Hybrid" journals allow authors to choose between publishing via the subscription model (free for authors) or Open Access (APC applies). Select the **Subscription** option upon submission to avoid fees.
:::


::: {.panel-tabset}

## Rural & Development

**Focus:** Rural Development, Livelihoods, Socio-economic Geography, Regional Studies.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Journal of Rural Studies** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-rural-studies) |
| **World Development** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/world-development) |
| **Land Use Policy** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/land-use-policy) |
| **Journal of Peasant Studies** | SSCI (Q1) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/fjps20) |
| **Sociologia Ruralis** | SSCI (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679523) |
| **Geoforum** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geoforum) |
| **Applied Geography** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/applied-geography) |
| **Regional Studies** | SSCI (Q1) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/cres20) |
| **Habitat International** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/habitat-international) |
| **Journal of Rural & Community Dev.** | ESCI | Brandon Univ. | Diamond OA (No Fee) | [Visit](https://journals.brandonu.ca/jrcd/) |
| **Population, Space and Place** | SSCI (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15448452) |

## Environment & LULC

**Focus:** LULC Change, Degradation, Soil Science, Environmental Management.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Journal of Environmental Management** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-environmental-management) |
| **Global Environmental Change** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/global-environmental-change) |
| **Science of the Total Environment** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/science-of-the-total-environment) |
| **Land Degradation & Development** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1099145x) |
| **Catena** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/catena) |
| **Geoderma** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geoderma) |
| **Soil and Tillage Research** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/soil-and-tillage-research) |
| **Ecological Indicators** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/ecological-indicators) |
| **Geomorphology** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geomorphology) |
| **Earth Surface Processes and Landforms** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10969837) |
| **Landscape and Urban Planning** | SSCI/SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/landscape-and-urban-planning) |
| **Environmental Monitoring and Assessment** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10661) |
| **Environmental Science & Policy** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/environmental-science-and-policy) |

## Water & Hazards

**Focus:** Hydrology, Climate Change, Floods, Droughts, Extreme Events.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Journal of Hydrology** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hydrology) |
| **Water Resources Research** | SCIE (Q1) | AGU / Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19447973) |
| **Water Resources Management** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/11269) |
| **Hydrological Processes** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10991085) |
| **Natural Hazards** | SCIE (Q1/Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/11069) |
| **Int. J. of Disaster Risk Reduction** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/international-journal-of-disaster-risk-reduction) |
| **Climatic Change** | SCIE (Q1) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10584) |
| **Journal of Flood Risk Management** | SCIE (Q1/Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1753318x) |
| **Advances in Water Resources** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/advances-in-water-resources) |
| **Hydrological Sciences Journal** | SCIE (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/thsj20) |
| **Groundwater** | SCIE (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://ngwa.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/17456584) |
| **Nature Climate Change** | SCIE (Q1) | Nature Portfolio | Subscription (No Fee) | [Visit](https://www.nature.com/nclimate/) |

## RS & GIS

**Focus:** Remote Sensing, GIS, Spatial Analysis, Radar/SAR.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Remote Sensing of Environment** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/remote-sensing-of-environment) |
| **ISPRS J. of Photogrammetry & RS** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/isprs-journal-of-photogrammetry-and-remote-sensing) |
| **IEEE Trans. on Geoscience & RS** | SCIE (Q1) | IEEE | Hybrid (Page Charges) | [Visit](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=36) |
| **Int. Journal of Remote Sensing** | SCIE (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tres20) |
| **Computers & Geosciences** | SCIE (Q2) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/computers-and-geosciences) |
| **Transactions in GIS** | SSCI (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679671) |
| **Cartography & Geog. Info. Science** | SSCI (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tcag20) |
| **Journal of Spatial Science** | SCIE (Q3) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tjss20) |
| **Photogrammetric Eng. & Remote Sensing**| SCIE (Q2) | ASPRS | Hybrid (Page Charges) | [Visit](https://www.asprs.org/photogrammetric-engineering-and-remote-sensing) |
| **GeoInformatica** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10707) |


## Agriculture & Ecology

**Focus:** Agroforestry, Crop Science, Forest Management, Soil-Plant Systems.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Agricultural Water Management** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/agricultural-water-management) |
| **Agriculture, Ecosystems & Env.** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/agriculture-ecosystems-and-environment) |
| **Forest Ecology and Management** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/forest-ecology-and-management) |
| **Agroforestry Systems** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10457) |
| **Paddy and Water Environment** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10333) |
| **Soil Use and Management** | SCIE (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14752743) |
| **Nutrient Cycling in Agroecosystems** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.springer.com/journal/10705) |
| **Crop Protection** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/crop-protection) |

## Urban & Planning

**Focus:** Urbanization, Regional Planning, Smart Cities, Sustainable Cities.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Cities** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/cities) |
| **Sustainable Cities and Society** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/sustainable-cities-and-society) |
| **Urban Forestry & Urban Greening** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/urban-forestry-and-urban-greening) |
| **Computers, Env. & Urban Systems** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/computers-environment-and-urban-systems) |
| **Journal of Urban Planning & Dev.** | SSCI (Q2) | ASCE | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://ascelibrary.org/journal/jupddm) |
| **European Planning Studies** | SSCI (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/ceps20) |
| **Journal of Regional Science** | SSCI (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) | [Visit](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679787) |


:::

<br>

## 🛡️ Submission & Safety Tips

Before submitting your manuscript, ensure you verify the journal's credibility and understand its metrics.

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 📊 Understanding Metrics
Journals are ranked by **Impact Factor (IF)** within their subject categories (e.g., Geography, Environmental Sciences).

*   **Q1 (Top 25%)**: Highest prestige and visibility. Often hardest to accept.
*   **Q2 (Top 25-50%)**: Excellent quality, balances visibility with slightly higher acceptance rates.
*   **Q3/Q4**: Good entry points for niche topics or early-career research.
:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🚩 avoiding Predatory Journals
Be cautious of **"Clone Journals"** that mimic the names of reputable titles.

1.  **Verify Indexing**: Always check the journal on the official [Master Journal List (MJL)](https://mjl.clarivate.com/).
2.  **Check ISSN**: Ensure the ISSN on the journal website matches the one on MJL.
3.  **Red Flags**: Avoid journals promising "Review in 3 days" or "Guaranteed Publication".
:::

:::

### ⏱️ How to Estimate Review Speed?
Most publishers now provide metrics on their journal homepages:
*   **Elsevier**: Look for "Time to First Decision" and "Review Time" on the Journal Insights page.
*   **Springer**: Check the "Journal Updates" or "About" section for speed metrics.
*   **Taylor & Francis**: Often displays "Speed/Acceptance" metrics in the journal banner.
